message:
test(lifecycle): add cross-surface version-agreement row (ibuuh.23)

Second row of the ibuuh.23 validation matrix: cross-surface consistency
invariant. The semver string that 'cass --version' prints must equal the
crate_version field of 'cass capabilities --json'. A drift here signals
that one of the two surfaces picked up a stale build-time constant — the
exact class of mismatch agents and operators otherwise only notice in
production after a user asks 'which version am I on'.

2/2 pass, 3 consecutive stable re-runs.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; bead stays open
for the remaining matrix rows (scheduler pause/resume, quarantine
transitions, retention safety, long-running maintenance coordination)
that need upstream subsystems from in-flight ibuuh.30/.32 before they
can land.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
